doc_title_en: Notice of Full-Year Consolidated Earnings Forecast Variance and Dividend of Surplus Funds (Dividend Increase and 10th Listing Anniversary Dividend)

key_facts.reason_jp: 上場10周年記念、過去実績からの安定的業績向上及び累進配当方針に基づく

summary_en: ¥46/share annual dividend (¥41 regular + ¥5 10th-listing-anniversary special) vs. ¥39 prior year. Regular dividend increased ¥2/share from prior guidance of ¥39. Payout ratio 28.2%, aligning with 25%+ target. Cumulative dividend progression maintained; special component commemorates March 2026 10th anniversary of listing.
summary_jp: 年間配当¥46/株（通常¥41 + 記念¥5）対前期¥39。通常配当を事前予想の¥39から¥2増配し¥41に決定。配当性向28.2%で25%以上の目標達成。累進配当継続、特別配当は上場10周年記念。
tag_en: Dividend hike - ¥46/share (¥41 regular + ¥5 10th anniversary) vs. ¥39 prior - 28.2% payout ratio - FY3/26
tag_jp: 増配 - ¥46/株（通常¥41 + 記念¥5）対前期¥39 - 配当性向28.2% - 3月期26年度
